body:
Hello Armaan,

We'd like to invite you to the technical interview round for the MLE Intern role at Anthropic. Please pick a 60-minute slot using the link below — no prep required beyond what we discussed on the phone screen.

https://calendly.com/anthropic-recruiting/tech-round

The interview will cover data structures, Python, and a short systems discussion. Looking forward to it!

Regards,
Sam
subject: Anthropic — Technical Interview Invitation
